'''Gaminne Group, Inc.''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] conglomerate in the [[Lan system]] a millennium before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They had purchased the mining rights to the system from the native [[Qieg/Legends|Qieg]], and established [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlements throughout the system, including the Human-style [[Shulell City]]. The conglomerate itself was no longer in existence by the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and the mining operations had been taken over by independent mining cooperatives.
